definitions.text: bli dratt inn i noe uten å ville det
definitions.translation: to get drawn into something unwillingly

examples.no: hum kommer stadig opp i problemer

definitions.text: bli trukket ut til å ha eksamen i
definitions.translation: to be drawn to have an exam in

examples.no: hele klassen kom opp i engelsk
examples.en: the whole class was selected for English
